scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,storefront -c blue,magenta "bun run --filter server dev" "bun run --filter storefront dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter server build && bun run --filter storefront build
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,storefront -c blue,magenta "bun run --filter server start" "bun run --filter storefront start"
